base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mt_ordeals — a tile from 1991 final fantasy iv. Mt. Ordeals — Cecil's Paladin transformation dungeon. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mt. Ordeals — Cecil's Paladin transformation dungeon
